recommendations.title: Lawnmower Man 2: Beyond Cyberspace
recommendations.overview: Now a shattered mind lurking in cyberspace, Jobe plots a return by hijacking a global VR network and rebuilding himself as something far beyond human. As reality starts to glitch, a small group races to stop a digital god who no longer needs a body.

recommendations.title: The Jurassic Games
recommendations.overview: In the near future, 10 death row convicts are forced to compete in a virtual reality game that pits them against dinosaurs and each other.

recommendations.title: Breathe
recommendations.overview: Air-supply is scarce in the near future, forcing a mother and daughter to fight for survival when two strangers arrive desperate for an oxygenated haven.

recommendations.title: Advantageous
recommendations.overview: In a near-future city where soaring opulence overshadows economic hardship, Gwen and her daughter, Jules, do all they can to hold on to their joy, despite the instability surfacing in their world.

recommendations.title: The Red Virgin
recommendations.overview: Hildegart is conceived and educated by her mother Aurora to be the woman of the future, to become one of the most brilliant minds of Spain in the 1930s and one of the European references on female sexuality.

recommendations.title: Game Therapy
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Adventure, Action, Fantasy, Drama
recommendations.overview: A man tries to cure his friend of his video-game obsession by using a virtual reality machine. When the device traps his friend in a virtual world, he goes in to help him fight for his life.

recommendations.title: Science Fiction Volume One: The Osiris Child
recommendations.overview: Set in the future in a time of interplanetary colonization, an unlikely pair race against an impending global crisis and are confronted by the monsters that live inside us all.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Flatliners
recommendations.overview: Five medical students experiment with "near death" experiences, until the dark consequences of past tragedies begin to jeopardize their lives.

recommendations.title: Selfie
recommendations.overview: In a world where digital technology has invaded our lives, some of us end up cracking. Addict or technophobe, with family or at school, at work or in love, SELFIE tells the comic and wild destinies of Homo Numericus on the verge of a nervous breakdow
recommendations.director: Tristan Aurouet, Marc Fitoussi, Cyril Gelblat, Vianney Lebasque, Thomas Bidegain
